rules.title: AIP reference code prefix
rules.description: aip_ref_code may be null or empty. If present and non-empty, it must start with one of: 1000, 3000, 8000, 9000.

rules.title: Date validity
rules.description: start_date and completion_date must be valid dates in month-name form (full or 3-letter, case-insensitive) or numeric form (M/D/YYYY or MM/DD/YYYY).

rules.title: Date order
rules.description: If both start_date and completion_date are present, non-empty, and valid under R002, then start_date must be earlier than completion_date. If start_date is the same as completion_date, do not add an error.

rules.title: Numeric fields
rules.description: personal_services, maintenance_and_other_operating_expenses, financial_expenses, capital_outlay, and total must be number or null.

rules.title: Total arithmetic
rules.description: total must equal personal_services + maintenance_and_other_operating_expenses + financial_expenses + capital_outlay, treating null as 0, with tolerance of 1.00 peso.

rules.title: Non-negative money
rules.description: All numeric budget fields (PS/MOOE/FE/CO/total) must be greater than or equal to 0 when not null.

notes: Barangay-specific: do not require cc_topology_code, climate_change_adaptation, or climate_change_mitigation.
If those climate/topology fields exist, ignore them unless explicitly requested otherwise.
Only check R003 if both dates are valid under R002.
For R005 and R006, only evaluate fields that are valid numbers or null.
Treat null as allowed unless another rule explicitly forbids it.
